_comment: Merge the 'hooks' key into your ~/.claude/settings.json. SessionStart and UserPromptSubmit use 'command'-type hooks so they can enrich the payload with terminal env info (TERM_PROGRAM, ITERM_SESSION_ID, tty) before posting to the app. All other hooks POST directly via HTTP. IMPORTANT: replace /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/CCTV below with the actual absolute path where you cloned this repo.

SessionStart._comment: command-type: the script reads TERM_PROGRAM / ITERM_SESSION_ID / tty from the claude process environment and enriches the payload before posting. Replace the path with the actual absolute path to your CCTV clone.

UserPromptSubmit._comment: command-type: same as SessionStart — captures terminal env so the app can focus the right terminal tab when the user clicks a foreground row.
